feat: implement Phase 1 & Phase 2 — setup and auth

Phase 1 — Project Setup:
- Init monorepo with backend/frontend/shared workspaces
- Fastify backend with /health endpoint \(tested\)
- Prisma + SQLite schema with all models \(User, Agent, Task, Transaction, etc.\)
- ioredis client with graceful fallback when Redis unavailable
- Next.js 14 + Tailwind + shadcn/ui components \(Button, Input, Label, Card\)

Phase 2 — Auth:
- POST /auth/register: bcrypt password hash, 1000 Pulse bonus, JWT
- POST /auth/login: credential validation, JWT
- GET /auth/me: JWT middleware protected endpoint
- Frontend: register/login pages with form validation and error display
- Zustand auth store with initialize\(\) for session restore
- Navbar component with balance display
- All auth tests pass \(12/12\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
